name: CV Sciences, Inc.
summary: PART I Overview CV Sciences, Inc. (CV Sciences, the Company, we, our or us) is a consumer wellness company specializing in nutraceuticals and plant-based foods. Our hemp extracts and other proven, science-backed, natural ingredients and products are sold through a range of sales channels from business-to-business (B2B) to business-to-consumer (B2C). Our +PlusCBD branded products are sold at select retail locations throughout the U.S. and are the top-selling brands of hemp extracts in the natural...
